case_title: DYER, NOEL et al VS CHESTNUT TRAVEL SERVICE, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $578.00 FILED BY DYER, NOEL DYER, ELEANOR AS TO DEFENDANT CHESTNUT TRAVEL SERVICE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHESTNUT TRAVEL SERVICE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DYER, NOEL DYER, ELEANOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHESTNUT TRAVEL SERVICE, INC. $578.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $593.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT CHESTNUT TRAVEL SERVICE, INC.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23012, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DYER, NOEL DYER, ELEANOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHESTNUT TRAVEL SERVICE, INC. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23012 ON 3-10-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
